title: Financial Planning Scope Selector
description: User-selectable scope for all financial planning operations: portfolio, region, property type, custom selection, or individual property

level.description: Scope level. 'portfolio' = all properties. 'region' = filter by region. 'property_type' = filter by asset class. 'custom' = user-defined property list. 'property' = single property.

propertyIds.description: Explicit property IDs when level=custom or level=property

sameStore.description: If true, only include properties owned for the full comparison period (per sameStore.minimumOwnershipMonths in thresholds)

sameStoreCutoffDate.description: Properties acquired before this date are same-store; null uses default (12 months prior)

includeDispositions.description: Include properties that have been disposed during the period

includeAcquisitions.description: Include properties acquired during the period (non-same-store)

projectionYears.description: Number of years for forward projections in business plans
